name: Petro Stopping Center - Portage
description: Major Petro/TA travel center at the I-39/90/94 Exit 108-A (Hwy 78) junction with about 300 truck parking spaces, 12 diesel lanes, 14 showers, Iron Skillet and Subway, TA Truck Service and a CAT Scale.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash - Portage
description: Blue Beacon truck and trailer wash at I-39/90/94 Exit 108-A, adjacent to the Petro Portage complex.

name: CAT Scale at Petro Portage
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Petro Stopping Center at I-39/90/94 Exit 108-A in Portage.

name: Kwik Trip #557 - DeForest
description: Kwik Trip travel center at I-90/94 Exit 126 (CTH V) offering diesel, DEF and truck parking on the DeForest/Windsor freight node.

name: Kwik Trip #673 - Windsor
description: Kwik Trip at I-90/94 Exit 131 and WIS 19 in Windsor with 2 diesel lanes, unleaded fuel and truck parking.

name: TA Madison (TravelCenters of America #050)
description: Full-service TA travel center at I-39/90/94 Exit 132 with 118 truck parking spaces, 9 showers, 8 fuel lanes, Popeyes, laundry, TA Truck Service (4 bays) and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at TA Madison DeForest
description: Certified CAT Scale at the TA Madison travel center at I-39/90/94 Exit 132 in DeForest.

name: Truckers Inn (Pilot/ONE9 dealer)
description: Independent Truckers Inn truck stop (Pilot/ONE9 fuel dealer) at I-39/90/94 Exit 132 with diesel, showers, restrooms, food, truck parking and an on-site truck wash.

name: Edgerton Travel Plaza (Roady's)
description: Independent Roady's-branded travel plaza at I-39/90 Exit 160, midway between Madison and Beloit, with diesel/DEF at all truck lanes, truck parking, showers and Wi-Fi.

name: TA Janesville (TravelCenters of America #071)
description: TA travel center at I-39/90 Exit 171-B (US-14) with 85 truck parking spaces, 4 showers, 8 fuel lanes, Wendy's, laundry, TA Truck Service (4 bays) and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at TA Janesville
description: Certified CAT Scale (#407) at the TA Janesville travel center at I-39/90 Exit 171-B.

name: Road Ranger Travel Center - Janesville
description: Road Ranger travel center near I-39/90 Exit 171-A (Milton Ave/WIS 26) in Janesville offering fuel and truck services.

name: Pilot Travel Center #289 - Beloit
description: Pilot travel center at I-39/90/43 Exit 185-A (WIS 81) with 8 fuel lanes, 55 truck parking spaces, 5 showers, Taco Bell, DEF lanes and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Beloit
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot Travel Center at I-39/90/43 Exit 185-A in Beloit.

name: Speedway - Beloit
description: Speedway fuel stop at I-39/90 Exit 185-A (Hwy 81) in Beloit with a 24/7 store, diesel lanes on the north side, ATM and propane exchange.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Janesville
description: Commercial truck tire dealer near I-39/90 in Janesville with Bridgestone/Firestone/Goodyear/Michelin truck tires and 24-hour roadside tire service.

name: Dewey's Towing & Recovery
description: 24-hour light and heavy-duty towing and recovery serving the I-39/90 Beloit-Janesville corridor.

name: Beloit Safety & Weight Enforcement Facility
description: WisDOT/State Patrol truck weigh and inspection station on I-39/90 in the Beloit-Janesville area near the Illinois state line.

name: Janesville Safety Rest Area (SRA 17)
description: WisDOT safety rest area on I-39/90 near mile marker 168 north of Janesville with car and truck parking, accessible restrooms, water, vending and travel info.

name: Beloit Welcome Center / Travel Information Center
description: WisDOT welcome center / rest area (SRA 22) on I-39/90 near mile marker 187 approaching the Illinois line at Beloit, with car and truck parking, accessible restrooms, vending and travel info.

name: Blackhawk Technical College - CDL Training
description: Public technical college in Janesville near the I-39/90 corridor offering hands-on Class A CDL truck driver training (classroom, yard and over-the-road).

name: Madison College - Truck Driving (ELDT/CDL)
description: Madison Area Technical College offers FMCSA-compliant Entry-Level Driver Training (ELDT) Class A and Class B-to-A CDL programs serving the I-39/90/94 Madison corridor.
